items.title: FINAL: Knicks 86, Pistons 75. They fall to 1-2 overall. Another strong performance from Chaz Lanier (24 points, 8-12 from 3). Ebuka Okorie finished with 14 points, 6 rebounds and 4 assists but shot 5-18 overall. He's been adjusting to the physicality.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II

items.title: Inspired by 82-0, we have put together this game we have called 73-9.
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt:
Inspired by 82-0, we have put together this game we have called 73-9.

You have $100 million to spend on players to try to beat the 2015-16 Warriors.

It's a long shot, especially because you are constrained by money.

Shoot your shot, though!

Link: hoopsmatic.com/73-9-game

items.title: Tie ball game at 45 at halftime which is remarkable considering where this thing seemed to be going. Pacers 12 of 33 from the floor, 5 of 12 from 3, 8 of 12 at the line. Raptors 17 of 40, 3 of 13, 5 of 7. Mast 13 points, Slawson 10, Yuki 8. Lundy 11, Bradley 10.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
